isolation.cookieHandling: Captured each fixture user's exact set-cookie header from POST /api/auth/sign-in/email and reused the resulting cookie name=value pair explicitly in Cookie headers.
isolation.mutationBoundary: Only the assigned invalid user.switchTeam rejection was exercised.

assertions.title: Protected team queries enforce guest and teamless boundaries

steps.expected: The team-protected query rejects the guest request as unauthorized.
steps.observed: GET /trpc/privateData returned HTTP 401 with error message 'Authentication required'.

steps.action: Sign in with the seeded teamless fixture user and request GET /trpc/privateData using the captured auth cookie.
steps.expected: The authenticated teamless request is rejected by the deterministic onboarding boundary.
steps.observed: GET /trpc/privateData returned HTTP 403 with error message 'Complete onboarding before accessing this resource'.

steps.action: Sign in with the seeded ready fixture user and request GET /trpc/privateData using the captured auth cookie.
steps.expected: The authenticated ready request succeeds and resolves the usable active workspace.
steps.observed: GET /trpc/privateData returned HTTP 200 and activeTeam 8df502bc-76a5-4125-b77f-f34d708f20de (auth-shell-round1 Ready Workspace).

evidence.network: GET /trpc/privateData -> 401 UNAUTHORIZED for guest; GET /trpc/privateData -> 403 FORBIDDEN with 'Complete onboarding before accessing this resource' for the teamless fixture; GET /trpc/privateData -> 200 OK for the ready fixture with activeTeam.id=8df502bc-76a5-4125-b77f-f34d708f20de.

assertions.title: Current-team primitives agree with the protected shell

steps.action: Sign in with the seeded ready fixture user and request GET /trpc/user.me.
steps.expected: user.me returns the active workspace identity for the session.
steps.observed: GET /trpc/user.me returned HTTP 200 with activeTeam 8df502bc-76a5-4125-b77f-f34d708f20de (auth-shell-round1 Ready Workspace).

steps.action: Request GET /trpc/team.current with the same ready-session cookie.
steps.expected: team.current returns the same active workspace id and name.
steps.observed: GET /trpc/team.current returned HTTP 200 with team 8df502bc-76a5-4125-b77f-f34d708f20de (auth-shell-round1 Ready Workspace).

steps.action: Request GET /trpc/privateData with the same ready-session cookie.
steps.expected: The protected team query resolves the same active workspace identity as the current-team primitives.
steps.observed: GET /trpc/privateData returned HTTP 200 with activeTeam 8df502bc-76a5-4125-b77f-f34d708f20de (auth-shell-round1 Ready Workspace).

evidence.network: GET /trpc/user.me -> 200 OK, GET /trpc/team.current -> 200 OK, and GET /trpc/privateData -> 200 OK; all three reported active workspace id=8df502bc-76a5-4125-b77f-f34d708f20de name='auth-shell-round1 Ready Workspace'.

assertions.title: Team list contains switchable memberships only

steps.action: Sign in with the seeded ready fixture user and request GET /trpc/team.list.
steps.expected: The team list contains only accepted memberships the user can enter, with switcher metadata, and excludes the seeded pending invite team.
steps.observed: GET /trpc/team.list returned HTTP 200 with 1 membership entry: [{"membershipId": "3c1f323c-bd32-45af-aa84-a42d260c37cf", "teamId": "8df502bc-76a5-4125-b77f-f34d708f20de", "name": "auth-shell-round1 Ready Workspace", "logoUrl": null, "role": "owner"}]. The pending invite targets teamId fba2a6b4-3f7f-4da8-a553-b0a2242cb894, which was not present.

evidence.network: GET /trpc/team.list -> 200 OK with one switchable membership (3c1f323c-bd32-45af-aa84-a42d260c37cf) for team 8df502bc-76a5-4125-b77f-f34d708f20de; the pending invite team fba2a6b4-3f7f-4da8-a553-b0a2242cb894 was excluded.

assertions.title: Invalid team-switch attempts are rejected safely

steps.action: Sign in with the seeded ready fixture user and POST /trpc/user.switchTeam using the assigned invalid foreign membership id.
steps.expected: The mutation is rejected because the ready user does not belong to that membership.
steps.observed: POST /trpc/user.switchTeam returned HTTP 403 with error message 'You are not a member of this team' for membershipId 81a80fae-4c4b-4bfb-8f27-637768fc6be9.

steps.action: Re-read GET /trpc/team.current after the rejected switch.
steps.observed: GET /trpc/team.current returned HTTP 200 with team 8df502bc-76a5-4125-b77f-f34d708f20de (auth-shell-round1 Ready Workspace).

steps.action: Re-read GET /trpc/privateData after the rejected switch.
steps.expected: Protected team data still resolves the original ready workspace.
steps.observed: GET /trpc/privateData returned HTTP 200 with activeTeam 8df502bc-76a5-4125-b77f-f34d708f20de (auth-shell-round1 Ready Workspace).

commands: curl -sS -i --max-time 20 -X POST -H Cookie: [ready set-cookie] -H Content-Type: application/json -d {"membershipId":"81a80fae-4c4b-4bfb-8f27-637768fc6be9"} http://api.faworra.localhost:1355/trpc/user.switchTeam
evidence.network: POST /trpc/user.switchTeam -> 403 FORBIDDEN with 'You are not a member of this team' for membershipId 81a80fae-4c4b-4bfb-8f27-637768fc6be9; follow-up GET /trpc/team.current and GET /trpc/privateData both stayed on activeTeam.id=8df502bc-76a5-4125-b77f-f34d708f20de.
